description: Fills the Paladin with holy spirit for 30 sec, granting each melee attack an additional [1.2 * (2324 * 1.2 * 1.03 * mainhandWeaponMaxBaseSpeed / 100) + 0.03 * (mainhandWeaponMaxDamage + mainhandWeaponMinDamage) / 2 + 1] Holy damage. Only one Seal can be active on the Paladin at any one time.Unleashing this Seal's energy will cause 225to_lc246 Holy damage to an enemy.
name: Seal of Righteousness
